query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME) FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'probes' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'last%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2YbtCA1K2KM9KYv.5dd22857b677 --database FxhMG2t4EnV6hSi7hwzAaR --execute SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME) FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'probes' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'last%';
